name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11469 Blue Porte Cartes Series New Arrival Pocket Wallet. This pocket wallet features Monogram Eclipse Reverse canvas for a compact structure and deep style, accented by calfskin trim to add a bold youthful touch. 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm.
